model.name: O'Hara-Rudy (ORd) — reduced reference kernel
model.formulation: human ventricular endocardial AP; Hodgkin-Huxley + algebraic IK1

validation.notes: Bundled kernel is a REDUCED reference implementation of the ORd lineage — structurally faithful (7 named currents, Hill block) and numerically stable, but not bit-exact to the published CellML. Tier C until cross-checked vs canonical CellML (Phase F).

extraction.method: reduced kernel implemented from the ORd lineage
extraction.notes: Equations not yet cross-checked vs canonical CellML.
